definition.name: Beta-FFT-procedure
definition.definition: Recursive procedure: get_AB(L, r) returns (A_r^L, B_r^L, A_{r-1}^L, B_{r-1}^L) as length-N vectors. Base r=1 returns (((2L+1)/(L+1))x, -L/(L+1), 1, 0). For r>1, split r = floor(r/2) + ceil(r/2); recurse on (L, n1) and (L+n1, n2); combine via composition rule with 4 Hadamard products + 2 sums. Each level O(N); depth O(log r); memoised so total visits O(r log r).
